message:
test(fnp-python): expand linalg_error_surface_probe to 6 functions

Extended the LinAlgError regression probe from 1 to 6 linalg paths:
inv(singular), svd(1-d), svdvals(1-d), qr(1-d), eig(1-d),
slogdet(non-square). All 6 paths correctly surface numpy's LinAlgError
(not plain ValueError) through either passthrough or in-Rust fast-path
fallback on error.

Locks the contract: any future in-Rust linalg fast path that flattens
to PyValueError via map_ufunc_error will trip this probe.
